backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for Shows and DJs, including creating, retrieving, and assigning DJs to shows, plus a `getCurrentShow` query that determines the currently airing show based on CST time.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: creating a `RecentlyPlayed` component with a Live365 iframe and embedding it on the Home page after the 'Ways to Listen' section.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, pages, hooks, styles, and admin views for The Country Channel app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'The Country Channel' and mounting the app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with public routes (Home, Shows, DJs) under a public layout and admin routes (Dashboard, ManageShows, ManageDJs) under an admin layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Admin shell layout with a collapsible sidebar (desktop and mobile overlay) containing navigation links to Dashboard, Manage Shows, and Manage DJs, plus a top bar with breadcrumb and back-to-site link.
frontend/src/components/admin/DJFormModa: Dialog modal for creating a new DJ or viewing an existing DJ's details, with form fields for name, bio, and photo URL; editing existing DJs is noted as unsupported by the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/ShowFormMo: A modal dialog component for creating or editing radio shows, with form fields for title, description, schedule, and DJ assignment, using React Hook Form-style state and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/DJCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a DJ's avatar, name, bio, and associated shows using country-themed amber/tan styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, quick navigation links, a live status indicator, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Public layout wrapper that renders the Navigation bar, a page content Outlet, and the Footer in a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, mobile hamburger menu, and a live 'On Air' indicator that shows the current show using the useCurrentShow hook.
frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx: Section component that displays the currently airing show with an animated 'On Air' badge, schedule info, and DJ name, or a fallback message when nothing is live.
frontend/src/components/RecentlyPlayed.t: Static section that embeds a Live365 iframe widget to display recently played tracks on The Country Channel.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Card component that renders a single show's title, description, schedule day/time, and associated DJ name given a Show and list of DJs.
frontend/src/components/WaysToListen.tsx: Section displaying four streaming platform cards (Live365, Radioline, OnlineRadioBox, GetMeRadio) with external links and styled 'Listen Now' buttons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and returns an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching shows and DJs and mutations for creating shows, assigning DJs, and creating DJs against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines light and dark CSS custom property themes with warm earthy/wood tones for the Country Channel app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin Dashboard page showing stat cards for total shows, total DJs, and assigned shows, plus a recent shows list with links to manage pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageDJs.tsx: Admin page for managing DJs, displaying them in a grid with avatars and bios, and supporting add/edit via a DJFormModal.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageShows.tsx: Admin page for managing radio shows in a sortable table, supporting add/edit via ShowFormModal with DJ assignment display.
frontend/src/pages/DJs.tsx: A page component that fetches and displays all DJs in a responsive grid using DJCard components, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The home page featuring a hero banner with a live listen button, followed by sections for on-air status, featured shows, and featured DJs fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Shows.tsx: Public Shows page that fetches and displays all radio shows in a responsive grid using ShowCard components, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the country-music-themed design system with custom colors (amber, tan, burnt-orange, wood-dark, admin tokens), serif font families, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, feature list, architectural notes (CST timezone requirement), and known issues for The Country Channel radio station app.
